name: Supercell
flavorHeadline: Ghost pepper + red fresno blend, black garlic umami depth
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Supercell EF-4 hot sauce with a dark crimson label
productStory: A massive, relentless system. Supercell demands respect. Ghost pepper dictates the heat, striking fast and holding on long, while the umami depth of black garlic grounds the flavor in pure, savory darkness. This is sophisticated, unapologetic destruction.
pairings: Slow-smoked ribs with a dry rub
Dark chocolate and aged cheddar board
